title: Hilton Grand Vacations: Another Year Of Growth
text: Hilton Grand Vacations, Inc. shows a better outlook with its impressive revenue growth and margin expansion.

title: Q1 2022 Earnings Season Gets Underway
text: Total S&P 500 earnings for the first quarter of 2022 are expected to be up +3.6% from the same period last year on +10.1% higher revenues.

title: Why Is Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) Down 1.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Hilton (HLT) Banks on Unit Expansion, Dismal RevPAR Hurts
text: Hilton's (HLT) continues to focus on loyalty program offerings to drive growth. However, a decline in RevPAR from pre-pandemic levels is a concern.

title: Pressure on Earnings Estimates: What Sectors are Most Impacted?
text: Estimates have been going down for 9 of the 16 Zacks sectors since the start of the year, with the biggest declines in the Consumer Discretionary, Utilities, Transportation, and Conglomerates sectors.

title: Pressure on Earnings Estimates: What Sectors are Most Impacted?
text: Estimates have been going down for 9 of the 16 Zacks sectors since the start of the year, with the biggest declines in the Consumer Discretionary, Utilities, Transportation, and Conglomerates sectors.

title: Marriott, Hilton still open in Russia even as other US companies leave
text: Some hotel chains — including Marriott International and Hilton – closed their corporate offices in Moscow and suspended new hotel development and investments in Russia, but they haven't closed their properties or removed their brands from the hotels.

title: Hilton to suspend development activity in Russia
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc said on Wednesday it would suspend all new development activity in Russia and had closed its corporate office in Moscow, following the invasion of Ukraine.

title: From Hilton To Papa John's To Uniqlo, Here Are Major Companies That Are Maintaining Businesses In Russia
text: Amid a rush of multinationals to exit Russia in the wake of its invasion of Ukraine, these companies are so far staying put.

title: 4 Consumer Discretionary Stocks That Can Shine When the Fed Lifts Rates
text: Darden Restaurants, Hasbro, Marriott International and Hilton Worldwide Holdings are poised to perform well in tightening financial conditions, finds an analysis by 22VResearch.

title: Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. (HGV) CEO Mark Wang on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. (HGV) CEO Mark Wang on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Hilton Grand Vacations Slides On Q4 Earnings Miss
text: Hilton Grand Vacations Inc (NYSE: HGV) reported fourth-quarter FY21 revenues of $838 million, missing the consensus of $856.93 million. Revenues were $212 million for the same period in 2020.

title: EAT, DRINK AND STAY INSPIRED: CONRAD NASHVILLE ANNOUNCES THREE NEW F&B CONCEPTS
text: NASHVILLE, Tenn., March 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Set to open in May 2022, Conrad Nashville introduces three highly-anticipated restaurant and lounge concepts in partnership with celebrated James Beard Award nominated hospitality industry veterans and husband-wife business partners, Elizabeth Blau and Chef Kim Canteenwalla.
